Meet Us

The People Behind
Every Celebration

We're a passionate team of bakers based in Ferozepur City. Every cake we make is crafted with heart — from the first sketch to the final garnish.

Led by Gourav Sachdeva, our small but dedicated team ensures your celebration is as sweet and special as you deserve.

🎂 Custom Cakes 🟢 100% Pure Veg 📦 Same Day Available 💯 Fresh Ingredients
